case_title: CLINTON JAY ROCKWELL VS. AFSANEH OSKOUY

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROCKWELL, CLINTON JAY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OSKOUY, AFSANEH THE EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2017 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,850.00 FILED BY ROCKWELL, CLINTON JAY AS TO DEFENDANT OSKOUY, AFSANEH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2017 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROCKWELL, CLINTON JAY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-18-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-18-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF CLINTON ROCKWELL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AFANEH OSKOUY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STATES THAT SHE RECEIVED A COPY OF THE CLAIM FROM THE SAN FRANCISCO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERIVCE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
